page: Microsoft Azure NV12s_v3 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the NVSv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. This server features an x86_64 Intel processor with 12 dedicated virtual CPUs and 112.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 9.33 GB of RAM per core. The hardware configuration includes a single graphics processing unit and 754 GB of local storage, with support for Premium Storage.

The allocation of dedicated vCPUs combined with a high memory-to-core ratio provides stable resource availability for workloads requiring concurrent CPU and GPU processing. Qualitatively, the inclusion of a bundled GPU and local storage within a single virtualized instance offers a consolidated resource profile, reducing the need for external storage attachments for data-heavy operations. This hardware profile is designed for workloads such as GPU-accelerated databases, visualization, data processing, and virtual desktop infrastructure.
description: Microsoft Azure NV12s_v3 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the NVSv3 family, powered by an Intel processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The hardware configuration features 12 dedicated vCPUs, 112.0 GB of system memory providing 9.33 GB per core, and a single onboard GPU. For storage, the instance includes 754 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. This configuration delivers a high memory-to-core ratio alongside dedicated compute resources and hardware acceleration. The integration of a GPU, substantial memory, and local storage makes this instance suitable for workloads requiring parallel processing and significant memory capacity, such as data visualization, rendering, and GPU-accelerated database operations. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without resource contention, while the Premium Storage capability allows for high-throughput disk I/O operations.
og_description: Microsoft Azure NV12s_v3 is an NVSv3 family virtual machine featuring 12 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 112.0 GB of RAM, a single GPU, and 754 GB of local storage with Premium Storage support.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure NV12s_v3 is an NVSv3 virtual machine with 12 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 112.0 GB RAM, one GPU, and 754 GB of local storage.
tagline: An accelerator-enabled virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel processors, high memory density, and local storage for parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: 12 dedicated Intel vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
112.0 GB of system memory providing 9.33 GB per core
754 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
